_comment: Per-leverage-point mapping to Aotearoa Data Explorer (ADE) SDMX queries. Keys are string forms of leverage-point ids (1..12) matching data/incidence.json. Each entry has bears_cost and benefits arrays of query objects. A query object shape is: {"context": "dataflow", "agencyId": "STATSNZ", "resourceId": "<DATAFLOW_ID>", "version": "1.0", "key": "all", "params": {"startPeriod": "2020"}}. Empty arrays keep the LP in 'pending distributional analysis' status.
